data.name: BadParameterDirectionMessage
data.value: Parameter "{0}" can only be an input parameter.

data.name: BadParameterMessage
data.value: Parameter value is not compatible with the parameter definition, or unexpected error when preparing the command for execution.

data.name: BadParameterSizeMessage
data.value: Parameter "{0}" value size {1} is not compatible with the parameter definition.

data.name: BadParameterTypeMessage
data.value: Parameter "{0}" value type {1} is not compatible with the parameter definition.

data.name: ErrorCannotLoadType
data.value: Cannot find type "{0}" in assembly "{1}".

data.name: ErrorConnectionClosedCommit
data.value: The connection is not open to commit the transaction.

data.name: ErrorConnectionClosedRollback
data.value: The connection is not open to roll back the transaction.

data.name: ErrorOledbProviderNotCompatible
data.value: Registry key "{0}" provider value is not compatible with this data access layer.

data.name: ErrorRegKeyNotDefined
data.value: Registry key "{0}" is not defined.

data.name: ErrorRegValueNotDefined
data.value: Registry key "{0}" {1} value is not defined.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderBadFromSpecified
data.value: AddFrom method join expression is forbidden on the first call and mandatory on all subsequent calls.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderColumnListEmpty
data.value: AddColumn method must be called at least once.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderColumnsZero
data.value: Columns collection must contain at least one element.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderInvalidStatementType
data.value: Statement type "{0}" is not valid for this operation.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderTableNameEmpty
data.value: TableName property must be specified.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderTypeInvalid
data.value: Type property not valid for this operation.

data.name: ErrorToSqlInvalidType
data.value: Cannot format type {0} as a Transact-SQL expression.

data.name: ErrorTranCountZeroCommit
data.value: There is no open transaction to commit.

data.name: ErrorTranCountZeroRollback
data.value: There is no open transaction to roll back.

data.name: ErrorTransactSqlNameDelimiterMismatch
data.value: T-SQL syntax error: no {0} found to match {1}.

data.name: ErrorTransactSqlNameOnlyWhitespaceAllowed
data.value: T-SQL syntax error: only whitespace allowed between {0} and {1}.

data.name: ObjectDisposedExceptionMessage
data.value: This object has already been disposed.

data.name: ErrorInvalidSchemaValue
data.value: Invalid schema value.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderBadFrom1
data.value: First table source must not have a join expression.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderBadFrom2
data.value: Subsequent table sources must all have a join expression.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderBadJoinValues
data.value: Join keyword and predicate must be specified or not specified together.

data.name: ErrorSqlBuilderCollectionEmpty
data.value: {0} collection must contain at least one element.

data.name: ErrorListNull
data.value: A null bracketed list is not valid Transact-SQL syntax.

data.name: ErrorTransactSqlNameNoNamePartsFound
data.value: T-SQL syntax error: no name parts found.

data.name: ErrorTransactSqlNameMoreThanFourNamePartsFound
data.value: T-SQL syntax error: more than four name parts found.

data.name: ErrorTransactSqlNameFirstNamePartMustBeSpecified
data.value: T-SQL syntax error: first name part must be specified.

data.name: ErrorTransactSqlNameLastNamePartMustBeSpecified
data.value: T-SQL syntax error: last name part must be specified.

data.name: ErrorBadCommandType
data.value: Unsupported command type in SQL Server.
